name: charity-net
description: Connecting people, charities, and the world

scripts.build: pnpm -r --filter './shared' build && pnpm -r --filter './server' build && pnpm -r --filter './client' build
scripts.dev: concurrently -n shared,server,client -c blue,magenta,cyan "pnpm dev:shared" "pnpm dev:server" "pnpm dev:client"
scripts.deploy:client: pnpm --filter @charity-net/shared build && pnpm --filter @charity-net/client build && firebase deploy --only hosting,firestore:rules,firestore:indexes,storage,functions
